_comment: El Ele Apartmanı — DetailStage metni (bu dil). Paylaşımlı ui.projects.detail varsayılanının üzerine deep-merge edilen proje-bazlı override; yalnız binaya özgü alanlar. TR kaynaktan çevrildi (localize-elele-detail workflow). Gri (örnek) değerler MEY doğrulayana kadar temsilîdir.

story.para: El Ele Apartmanı brings the elegance of classic architecture together with modern comfort. Its white stucco façade, natural-stone moldings and hand-crafted wrought-iron balcony railings add lasting value to the fabric of the street.
story.salonAlt: Living room — bathed in daylight from a large window (representative image)
story.malzemeAlt: Façade detail — wrought-iron railing and white-stucco craftsmanship (representative composition)

chapters.name: FAÇADE
chapters.text: A classic white façade given rhythm by wrought-iron railings and stone moldings.
chapters.alt: Façade detail — wrought iron and stucco (representative)

chapters.name: INTERIOR
chapters.text: Airy interiors shaped by daylight and a restrained material language.

chapters.name: LIVING
chapters.text: Peaceful, light-filled living areas that open to the city through large windows.
chapters.alt: Living room and window — living area (representative image)

spaces.mapAlt: Site plan — building and parcel layout (representative)

timeline.name: Structural Shell
timeline.desc: The load-bearing system and structural shell were completed.

timeline.name: Handover
timeline.desc: Finishing works and inspections were completed and the building was handed over.

samples.address: BATI MAH. ÇİĞDEM SOK. NO:6, PENDİK/İSTANBUL
